Records.description: Fully massive one-loop pentagon with 5 propagator masses and 10 external invariants (15 scales), computed to $\mathcal{O}(\varepsilon^1)$ in $D=6-2\varepsilon$. Decomposed into 120 orthoschemes. Three types of square root rationalization. First explicit MPL result for the generic massive pentagon at any $\varepsilon$ order.
Records.familyName: fully massive 1-loop pentagon (15 scales, higher eps)

Records.description: Generic massive one-loop pentagon integral family with 5 propagators and generic internal and external masses, used as the maximal topology for d_int=4 one-loop integrals. Serves as the framework for constructing dual forms (elements of twisted relative cohomology) and computing generalized unitarity coefficients via intersection numbers. The paper shows a complete basis of 31 master integrals for generic masses (1 pentagon, 5 boxes, 10 triangles, 10 bubbles, 5 tadpoles).
Records.location: eq. (eq:pentprop), Section 3.3 (Zero-dimensional: pentagon dual); basis size 31 mentioned in Section 2.3

Names: fully massive 1-loop pentagon (15 scales, higher eps)
